---
title: "scGenotyping all cells"
output: html_notebook
---

## Libs
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(readr)
library(pagoda2)
library(conos)
library(cacoa)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrastr)
library(cowplot)
library(scHelper)

set.seed(1)
```
```{r}
# Check if 'figure' folder exists, if not, create it
if (!dir.exists("figures")) {
  dir.create("figures")
  cat("Created 'figures' folder\n")
} else {
  cat("'figures' folder already exists\n")
}

```

## Load in data
### count matrix neurons and cells identified via pac-bio seq
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
con <- readRDS("../../3.all_cells/con_all.rds")
cms <- lapply(names(con$samples), function(x) con$samples[[x]]$counts %>% t()) %>% setNames(names(con$samples))
```

```{r}
map <- read_tsv("indices_sample_identifier.tsv")
#pseudo_to_real <- setNames(map$Sample, map$`Sample Id`)
pseudo_to_real <- setNames(map$Sample,tolower(map$`Sample Id`))
```

## Files with cell barcodes
```{r}
# --- Read CBcount files -------------------------------------------------------
cb_files <- list.files(path = "../../../TSC2024_data_files/5.neurons/scgenotype/MN1016/results/",
  pattern = "^tsc-[0-9]+\\.chr.*\\.CBcount\\.txt$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

cb_list <- lapply(cb_files, function(f) {
  read.table(f, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
})
names(cb_list) <- sub("\\.chr.*", "", basename(cb_files))
```

```{r}
subset_by_cb <- function(mat, cb_df, real_sample) {
  cn <- colnames(mat)

  # 1) Keep only columns from the correct real sample
  sample_ok <- startsWith(cn, paste0(real_sample, "!!"))

  # 2) Extract the "cellbarcode" part (after second !!)
  cell_bc <- vapply(
    strsplit(cn, "!!", fixed = TRUE),
    `[`,
    character(1),
    3
  )

  # 3) Remove numeric suffixes after dash, e.g. "-1"
  cell_bc <- sub("-\\d+$", "", cell_bc)

  # 4) Keep only columns present in CBcount
  keep <- sample_ok & cell_bc %in% cb_df$CellBarcode

  mat[, keep, drop = FALSE]
}

```

```{r}
cms_subset <- lapply(names(cb_list), function(tsc) {
  real_sample <- pseudo_to_real[[tsc]]

  # skip if mapping or matrix is missing
  if (is.na(real_sample) || !real_sample %in% names(cms)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  subset_by_cb(
    mat = cms[[real_sample]],
    cb_df = cb_list[[tsc]],
    real_sample = real_sample
  )
})

names(cms_subset) <- names(cb_list)
cms_subset <- cms_subset[!vapply(cms_subset, is.null, logical(1))]

```

### Now all genotyped cells are extracted, we filter for 0 wt reads along with 2 or 3 or 4 and above mutant reads. 

```{r}
subset_homozygous_mut <- function(mat, cb_df, real_sample, min_mut_reads = 4) {
  cn <- colnames(mat)

  # 1) Keep only columns from the correct real sample
  sample_ok <- startsWith(cn, paste0(real_sample, "!!"))

  # 2) Extract the "cellbarcode" part (after second !!) and strip numeric suffix
  cell_bc <- vapply(strsplit(cn, "!!", fixed = TRUE), `[`, 3, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  cell_bc <- sub("-\\d+$", "", cell_bc)

  # 3) Subset cb_df to only matching barcodes
  cb_df_sub <- cb_df[cb_df$CellBarcode %in% cell_bc, , drop = FALSE]

  # 4) Determine which barcodes meet homozygous criteria
  hom_mut_bc <- cb_df_sub$CellBarcode[cb_df_sub$WT == 0 & cb_df_sub$Mut >= min_mut_reads]

  # 5) Keep only columns whose cleaned barcode is in hom_mut_bc
  keep <- sample_ok & cell_bc %in% hom_mut_bc

  mat[, keep, drop = FALSE]
}

```

```{r}
# Example for min_mut_reads = 4
cms_hommut <- lapply(names(cb_list), function(tsc) {
  real_sample <- pseudo_to_real[[tsc]]
  if (is.na(real_sample) || !real_sample %in% names(cms)) return(NULL)

  subset_homozygous_mut(
    mat = cms[[real_sample]],
    cb_df = cb_list[[tsc]],
    real_sample = real_sample,
    min_mut_reads = 2
  )
})

names(cms_hommut) <- names(cb_list)
cms_hommut <- cms_hommut[!vapply(cms_hommut, is.null, logical(1))]

```

```{r}
sapply(cms_hommut, ncol)
```

```{r}
# Number of CBcount-matching cells per sample
cbcount_cells <- sapply(names(cb_list), function(tsc) {
  real_sample <- pseudo_to_real[[tsc]]
  if (is.na(real_sample) || !real_sample %in% names(cms)) return(0)
  ncol(subset_by_cb(cms[[real_sample]], cb_list[[tsc]], real_sample))
})

cbcount_cells

```
```{r}
thresholds <- 2:4
prob_mut <- 1- (1/2)^thresholds
hommut_counts <- lapply(thresholds, function(thr) {
  sapply(names(cb_list), function(tsc) {
    real_sample <- pseudo_to_real[[tsc]]
    if (is.na(real_sample) || !real_sample %in% names(cms)) return(0)
    ncol(subset_homozygous_mut(
      cms[[real_sample]],
      cb_list[[tsc]],
      real_sample,
      min_mut_reads = thr
    ))
  })
})

names(hommut_counts) <- paste0("Mut>=", thresholds," (",round(100*prob_mut, 1),"%)")
hommut_counts

```
```{r}
# Convert list to data.frame
hommut_df <- do.call(rbind, hommut_counts)
colnames(hommut_df) <- names(cb_list)
hommut_df <- as.data.frame(hommut_df)
hommut_df$Threshold <- paste0("Mut>=", thresholds)

# Add total CBcount-matching cells
cbcount_row <- c(cbcount_cells, Threshold="Total CBcount")
hommut_df <- rbind(hommut_df, cbcount_row)

# Reorder columns: Threshold first
hommut_df <- hommut_df[, c("Threshold", names(cb_list))]

hommut_df

```
```{r}
# --- Homozygous mutant counts (rows = thresholds, cols = samples) ------------
hommut_mat <- do.call(rbind, hommut_counts)
colnames(hommut_mat) <- names(cb_list)

# Probability labels
prob_mut <- 1 - (1/2)^thresholds
threshold_labels <- paste0(
  "Mut>=", thresholds,
  " (", round(100 * prob_mut, 1), "%)"
)

percent_df <- hommut_mat
for (s in colnames(percent_df)) {
  percent_df[, s] <- paste0(
    hommut_mat[, s],
    " (",
    round(100 * hommut_mat[, s] / cbcount_cells[s], 1),
    "%)"
  )
}

percent_df <- as.data.frame(percent_df)

percent_df$Threshold <- threshold_labels
percent_df <- percent_df[, c("Threshold", colnames(percent_df))]

percent_df <- rbind(
  percent_df,
  c("Total CBcount", as.character(cbcount_cells[colnames(hommut_mat)]))
)
percent_df$Threshold.1 <- NULL
rownames(percent_df)[nrow(percent_df)] <- ""

percent_df



```

```{r}
# Total CBcount cells across all samples
total_cb <- sum(cbcount_cells)

# Build summary table
total_mut_df <- data.frame(
  Threshold = paste0(
    "Mut>=", thresholds,
    " (", round((1 - (1/2)^thresholds) * 100, 1), "%)"
  ),
  Mutated_Cells = sapply(hommut_counts, sum),
  Total_CBcount = total_cb
)

# Add percentage
total_mut_df$Percent_Mutated <- round(
  100 * total_mut_df$Mutated_Cells / total_mut_df$Total_CBcount,
  2
)

total_mut_df

```

### Plot onto UMAP

```{r}
all_cells <- unlist(lapply(cms, colnames), use.names = FALSE)
cell_class <- setNames(rep("unclassified", length(all_cells)), all_cells)
```

```{r}
for (tsc in names(cb_list)) {

  real_sample <- pseudo_to_real[[tsc]]
  if (is.na(real_sample) || !real_sample %in% names(cms)) next

  mat <- cms[[real_sample]]
  cn  <- colnames(mat)

  # Extract clean barcodes
  cell_bc <- vapply(strsplit(cn, "!!", fixed = TRUE), `[`, 3, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  cell_bc_clean <- sub("-\\d+$", "", cell_bc)

  cb_df <- cb_list[[tsc]]

  # Match CBcount rows to matrix columns
  idx <- match(cell_bc_clean, cb_df$CellBarcode)
  valid <- !is.na(idx)

  # Subset CBcount rows aligned to columns
  cb_sub <- cb_df[idx[valid], ]
  col_sub <- cn[valid]

  # --- Classification rules --------------------------------------------------

  # Het: WT > 0
  cell_class[col_sub[cb_sub$WT > 0]] <- "Heterozygous"

  # Mut thresholds (overwrite progressively)
  cell_class[col_sub[cb_sub$WT == 0 & cb_sub$Mut >= 2]] <- "Mut>=2 (75%)"
  cell_class[col_sub[cb_sub$WT == 0 & cb_sub$Mut >= 3]] <- "Mut>=3 (87.5%)"
  cell_class[col_sub[cb_sub$WT == 0 & cb_sub$Mut >= 4]] <- "Mut>=4 (93.8%)"
}

```
```{r}
cell_class <- factor(
  cell_class,
  levels = c(
    "unclassified",
    "Heterozygous",
    "Mut>=2 (75%)",
    "Mut>=3 (87.5%)",
    "Mut>=4 (93.8%)"
  )
)

```
```{r}
table(cell_class)

# How many CBcount cells classified?
sum(cell_class != "unclassified")

# Check a few names
head(names(cell_class))

```
## Load cacoa object


```{r}
size = 0.1
alpha = 0.2

cao <- readRDS("../../3.all_cells/cao_control_tsc_all.rds")
bs <- if (length(levels(cao$cell.groups)) > 20) 10 else 16
cao$plot.theme <- theme_bw(base_size = bs) + 
  theme(plot.title=element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        legend.background=element_rect(fill=alpha("white", 0.2)),
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), 
        legend.margin=margin(6, 6, 4, 1, 'pt'),
        plot.margin=margin())


cao$cell.groups.palette <- levels(cao$cell.groups) %>% 
  {setNames(sample(brewerPalette("Paired")(length(.))), .)}

cao.gt <- readRDS("../../3.all_cells/cao_control_tsc_all.rds")
cao.gt$plot.theme <- theme_bw(base_size = bs) + 
  theme(plot.title=element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        legend.background=element_rect(fill=alpha("white", 0.2)),
        legend.text=element_text(size=12), 
        legend.margin=margin(6, 6, 4, 1, 'pt'),
        plot.margin=margin())

cell_class %<>% droplevels("unclassified")
cao.gt$cell.groups <- cell_class
cao.gt$cell.groups.palette <- levels(cao.gt$cell.groups) %>% 
  {setNames(sample(brewerPalette("Paired")(length(.))), .)}

cao.gt$cell.groups.palette[1] <- "lightblue"
cao.gt$cell.groups.palette[2] <- "orange"
cao.gt$cell.groups.palette[3] <- "purple"
cao.gt$cell.groups.palette[4] <- "red"

```
# Fig. 6a,b
```{r fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
pdf(file = "figures/annotation_genotype_all_cells.pdf", height = 8, width = 16)
plot_grid(
  cao$plotEmbedding(color.by='cell.groups', alpha=alpha, size=size, title='Cell type', 
                    plot.na=FALSE, show.legend=FALSE, font.size=c(2.5,3)) %>% rasterise(dpi=600) + theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank()),
  cao.gt$plotEmbedding(color.by='cell.groups', alpha=0.8, size=0.8, title='Genotype', plot.na=FALSE,mark.groups=FALSE) + 
    theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.border = element_blank(),legend.position=c(0.90, 0.10)) + 
    guides(color=guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5,alpha=1),title=''))
) + theme(plot.margin=unit(c(0.2,0.2,0.2,0.2),"cm"))
dev.off()
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
